title: melancranis fastigiata
side_effects: Melancranis fastigiata can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems. Ingesting the plant's leaves or flowers can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils may also lead to respiratory issues, including wheezing and shortness of breath. Furthermore, using the plant's extracts as a topical treatment without proper dilution can cause skin burns and blisters.
